'''jahojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadman|roadman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-h-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadman|roadman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jahojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæhejeth|jæhejeth]] || [[word:jæhejej|jæhejej]] || [[word:jæhejesh|jæhejesh]] || [[word:jæheje|jæheje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jahohojoth|jahohojoth]] || [[word:jahohojoj|jahohojoj]] || [[word:jahohojosh|jahohojosh]] || [[word:jahohojo|jahohojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jahojoth|jahojoth]] || [[word:jahojoj|jahojoj]] || [[word:jahojosh|jahojosh]] || [[word:jahojo|jahojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jahofjoth|jahofjoth]] || [[word:jahofjoj|jahofjoj]] || [[word:jahofjosh|jahofjosh]] || [[word:jahofjof|jahofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jahojotho|jahojotho]] || [[word:jahojojo|jahojojo]] || [[word:jahojosho|jahojosho]] || [[word:jahojoko|jahojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jahojoth|jahojoth]] || [[word:jahojoj|jahojoj]] || [[word:jahojosh|jahojosh]] || [[word:jahojo|jahojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jahojothol|jahojothol]] || [[word:jahojojol|jahojojol]] || [[word:jahojoshol|jahojoshol]] || [[word:jahojokol|jahojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jahojothotho|jahojothotho]] || [[word:jahojojojo|jahojojojo]] || [[word:jahojoshosho|jahojoshosho]] || [[word:jahojoko|jahojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jahojothon|jahojothon]] || [[word:jahojojon|jahojojon]] || [[word:jahojoshon|jahojoshon]] || [[word:jahojokon|jahojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jahojothoro|jahojothoro]] || [[word:jahojojoro|jahojojoro]] || [[word:jahojoshoro|jahojoshoro]] || [[word:jahojokoro|jahojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
